name: rty-atlassian-mcp
description: Provides agents with access to Jira and Confluence via Atlassian's official cloud MCP server

interface.shortDescription: Configure Atlassian's cloud MCP server for Jira and Confluence access.
interface.longDescription: Provides AI agents with access to Jira issues and Confluence pages via Atlassian's official cloud MCP server. Covers initial setup, OAuth flow, and effective usage patterns for Riverty's Atlassian environment.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me access Jira and Confluence with Atlassian MCP.
